reviews.comment:
Excelente parada obligada por la RN23 no hay otra cosa hasta Bariloche

(Translated by Google)
Excellent stop, a must-see on Route 23; there's nothing else until Bariloche.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5OGFINUxnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es un buen lugar para hacer un alto en la.ruta. no es sencillo ir al bar por la.cantidad de.personas que pueden estar en el local.por el protocolo de covid.
En verano,.suele haber cola de hasta 8 autos para cargar combustible. Suelen atender rápido.

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place to stop along the way. Going to the bar isn't easy because of the number of people allowed inside due to COVID protocols.

In the summer, there's usually a line of up to eight cars waiting to fill up. They're usually quick to serve.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5X3B6dU5BEAE

reviews.comment:
En el medio de la nada y con la próxima estacion a 190 km yendo hacia ruta 3 no tenian naftas!!! Vergonzoso!!

(Translated by Google)
In the middle of nowhere, with the next gas station 190 km away on Route 3, they had no gas!!! Shameful!!

reviews.comment:
Por ser la única en su zona , siempre se forma fila para cargar combustible , pero la espera se contrarresta con la atención de los playeros , de 10.

(Translated by Google)
Because it's the only one in the area, there's always a line to refuel, but the wait is offset by the excellent service from the attendants.
